docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUSCHKE, ERIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAUSCHEK, MARTHA $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,330.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $1,330.36 RE 32428 FOR TRANSACTION W0614306D004 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO ERIN HUSCHKE, DOC #1905961051, WARRANT #38203231, DATED APR-14-2014
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY HUSCHKE, ERIN AS TO DEFENDANT TAUSCHEK, MARTHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS (COPY FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING DEPT.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUSCHKE, ERIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT TAUSCHEK, MARTHA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JAN-26-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAUSCHEK, MARTHA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2014 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT TAUSCHEK, MARTHA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TAUSCHEK, MARTHA
